member.name: T:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.Properties.Resources.JellyfinIcon
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Icon similar to (Icon).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.StringExtensions.Truncate(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Truncates the input string to a max size and appends the suffix if truncated.
member.param: The suffix to append when Truncated.
member.returns: The original string if not exceeding otherwise the truncated string with .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.TrayApplicationContext.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Windows.Tray.TrayApplicationContext.InitApplication
member.returns: boolean value if the application should start rendering its UI.
